sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27857" key="dokikw=" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δοκικῶ</orth>, com. barbarism for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δοκέω,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
